name: Martha
oracleText:
Vigilance
Whenever Martha enters the battlefield or attacks, create a Food token.
{2}, {T}: Untap another target permanent.
flavorText: "Martha, Martha, thou art careful and troubled about many things:" — Luke 10:41
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; first-pass mechanics, mana, colors, and stats added. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses Charles de La Fosse's "Christ in the House of Martha and Mary" via Wikimedia Commons.
title: Faithful in Service

classics.license: Public domain; Wikimedia Commons hosts a faithful reproduction of a public-domain work.
classics.creditText: Charles de La Fosse, Christ in the House of Martha and Mary
classics.sourceNotes: This is a clean classics fit for Martha’s service-centered role in Bethany.
